features: Local Inspector Bind Address: Automatically bind the inspector web interface to 0.0.0.0 inside containers (or configure via LFT_INSPECTOR_BIND) to support host-to-container port mappings in LDM.
LDM Environment Fallbacks: Natively support LDM environment variables (LFT_SUBDOMAIN, LFT_SERVER_URL, LFT_TOKEN) and automatically clean/strip URL schemes and port suffixes from LFT_TARGET_HOST.
Docker Client Platform Identification: Automatically identify containerized clients and append ' (Docker)' to their OS name inside system analytics and connection stats.
Modal Escaping Hotfix: Fixed HTML escaping in the User Details modal to render localized Joined Date timestamps correctly.

Dual-Mode Maintenance: Soft Maintenance ('Bouncer Mode') and Hard Maintenance ('Fire Curtain') settings relocated to a dedicated 'Gateway Maintenance' screen under the sidebar Maintenance section, fully translated across all 10 locales.
Portal Activity Check-in: Real-time user online session tracking dot on the Users table.
User Details & Tunnels Modal: Consolidated administration overlay showing active tunnel ports, public links, client details, and direct lease kicking control.
Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA): Robust TOTP setup and reset directly integrated into the developer settings and admin console.
LDM Target Host Interceptor: Rewrite Host headers dynamically (`LFT_TARGET_HOST`) to match local containerized port environments.
Full Dashboard Localization: Seamless real-time bilingual switching across 9 supported locales.
Advanced SSO Integrations: Complete OIDC compatibility supporting secure Liferay SSO and Keycloak authorization flows.
SentinelOne False Positive Mitigations: Embedded Attestation signatures and canonical formula setups for Homebrew and Scoop.
